items.description: Role metadata generated from metadata.rb
items.notes: metadata.rb → meta/main.yml with namespace: x2a, Ubuntu focal/jammy, EL 7/8

items.description: Main tasks entry point — includes sub-task files in order: security, nginx, ssl, sites
items.notes: Duplicate entry — main.yml already tracked under recipes/default.rb. Marked complete.

items.description: Default variables for the role (sites list, security flags, etc.)
items.notes: No AAP Private Hub collections required — no requirements.yml dependencies

items.description: Handlers for nginx reload, fail2ban restart, and ssh restart
items.notes: Handlers: reload/restart nginx, restart fail2ban, restart ssh, reload sysctl

items.description: Deploy per-site nginx vhost configs, create sites-enabled symlinks, remove default site
items.notes: sites.rb loop logic: template per site → sites-available, symlink → sites-enabled, remove default site

items.description: Security hardening: fail2ban, ufw firewall rules, sysctl kernel params, SSH hardening
items.notes: security.rb: fail2ban, ufw rules, sysctl, SSH hardening. UFW commands use ansible.builtin.command (no shell operators)

items.description: Install nginx, deploy nginx.conf and security.conf, create document roots, deploy static files, enable service
items.notes: nginx.rb: install nginx, deploy nginx.conf + security.conf, create docroots, copy static files, enable service

items.description: Install openssl/ca-certificates, create ssl-cert group, SSL directories, generate self-signed certs for all three sites
items.notes: ssl.rb: openssl install, ssl-cert group, cert/key dirs, self-signed cert generation per site, key permissions

items.description: Entry point recipe — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites sub-tasks in order
items.notes: default.rb: include_recipe calls → include_tasks in main.yml. validate_credentials.yml included first per policy.

items.description: Chef default attributes → Ansible defaults (sites list, SSL flags, security SSH flags, nginx/fail2ban settings)
items.notes: Chef attributes → Ansible defaults. nginx_sites dict, SSL paths, security flags, nginx_user with OS family conditional

items.description: Global nginx configuration — worker_processes, connections, gzip, includes conf.d and sites-enabled
items.notes: Static ERB template (no variables) — converted 1:1 to Jinja2

items.description: Per-site nginx vhost config — HTTP→HTTPS redirect block + HTTPS block with TLS, HSTS, security headers, per-site logs; rendered 3× (test, ci, status)
items.notes: ERB variables @server_name, @document_root, @ssl_enabled, @cert_file, @key_file → Jinja2 {{ }} / {% if %}

items.description: Nginx security config — server_tokens off, rate-limit zones, buffer protections, timeouts, global SSL settings
items.notes: Static ERB template — converted 1:1 to Jinja2

items.description: Kernel sysctl security parameters — IP spoofing, redirect, martians, SYN cookies, IPv6 disable, etc.
items.notes: Static ERB template — converted 1:1 to Jinja2

items.description: fail2ban jail configuration — 5 jails: DEFAULT, sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch
items.notes: Static ERB template — converted 1:1 to Jinja2

items.description: Static landing page for test.cluster.local site — deployed to /opt/server/test/index.html (owner www-data, mode 0644)
items.notes: Copied verbatim from Chef cookbook files/default/test/index.html

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, SSL dirs, document roots, fail2ban config, sysctl config)
items.notes: FINAL: 10 sections, 11 dirs, nginx.conf, security.conf, 3x vhost configs, 3x sites-enabled symlinks, default site absent, 3x index.html, 3x SSL certs (0644), 3x SSL keys (0640), jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, 6x log placeholders. No become/sudo, no Docker driver, no include_role. All paths under /tmp/molecule_test/.

items.description: Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: nginx.conf, security.conf, site configs, SSL dirs, document roots, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl config
items.notes: FINAL: 12 sections, 60+ assertions. Dirs, nginx.conf directives, security.conf hardening, 3x vhost content, 3x symlink targets, default absent, 3x index.html content, 3x certs, 3x keys (mode 0640), jail.local sections, sysctl params. Sections 11-12 tagged molecule-notest for nginx -t and HTTP port checks.
